content:
<!-- type: test-plan lang: markdown -->

All tests go in `crates/cclab-queue/src/state.rs` as `#[cfg(test)] mod tests`.

### TaskState Enum

| ID | Test | Covers | Assertion |
|----|------|--------|-----------|
| T1 | `default_is_pending` | Default impl | `TaskState::default() == TaskState::Pending` |
| T2 | `serde_round_trip` | Serialize/Deserialize + rename_all | `serde_json::to_string(Pending) == "\"PENDING\""`, round-trip all 9 variants |
| T3 | `serde_screaming_snake_case` | serde rename_all | Each variant serializes to SCREAMING_SNAKE_CASE: PENDING, RECEIVED, STARTED, OFFLOADED, SUCCESS, FAILURE, RETRY, REVOKED, REJECTED |

### is_terminal()

| ID | Test | Covers | Assertion |
|----|------|--------|-----------|
| T4 | `terminal_states` | is_terminal true | Success, Failure, Revoked, Rejected all return true |
| T5 | `non_terminal_states` | is_terminal false | Pending, Received, Started, Offloaded, Retry all return false |

### is_active()

| ID | Test | Covers | Assertion |
|----|------|--------|-----------|
| T6 | `active_states` | is_active true | Received, Started, Retry, Offloaded all return true |
| T7 | `non_active_states` | is_active false | Pending, Success, Failure, Revoked, Rejected all return false |

### is_offloaded()

| ID | Test | Covers | Assertion |
|----|------|--------|-----------|
| T8 | `offloaded_true` | is_offloaded true | `Offloaded.is_offloaded() == true` |
| T9 | `offloaded_false_all_others` | is_offloaded false | All 8 non-Offloaded variants return false |

### can_transition_to() ŌĆö Valid Transitions

| ID | Test | Covers | Assertion |
|----|------|--------|-----------|
| T10 | `pending_to_received` | PendingŌåÆReceived | `Pending.can_transition_to(Received) == true` |
| T11 | `pending_to_revoked` | PendingŌåÆRevoked | `Pending.can_transition_to(Revoked) == true` |
| T12 | `received_to_started` | ReceivedŌåÆStarted | `Received.can_transition_to(Started) == true` |
| T13 | `received_to_revoked` | ReceivedŌåÆRevoked | `Received.can_transition_to(Revoked) == true` |
| T14 | `received_to_rejected` | ReceivedŌåÆRejected | `Received.can_transition_to(Rejected) == true` |
| T15 | `started_to_success` | StartedŌåÆSuccess | `Started.can_transition_to(Success) == true` |
| T16 | `started_to_failure` | StartedŌåÆFailure | `Started.can_transition_to(Failure) == true` |
| T17 | `started_to_retry` | StartedŌåÆRetry | `Started.can_transition_to(Retry) == true` |
| T18 | `started_to_revoked` | StartedŌåÆRevoked | `Started.can_transition_to(Revoked) == true` |
| T19 | `started_to_offloaded` | StartedŌåÆOffloaded | `Started.can_transition_to(Offloaded) == true` |
| T20 | `offloaded_to_success` | OffloadedŌåÆSuccess | `Offloaded.can_transition_to(Success) == true` |
| T21 | `offloaded_to_failure` | OffloadedŌåÆFailure | `Offloaded.can_transition_to(Failure) == true` |
| T22 | `offloaded_to_retry` | OffloadedŌåÆRetry | `Offloaded.can_transition_to(Retry) == true` |
| T23 | `offloaded_to_revoked` | OffloadedŌåÆRevoked | `Offloaded.can_transition_to(Revoked) == true` |
| T24 | `retry_to_pending` | RetryŌåÆPending | `Retry.can_transition_to(Pending) == true` |
| T25 | `retry_to_received` | RetryŌåÆReceived | `Retry.can_transition_to(Received) == true` |
| T26 | `retry_to_failure` | RetryŌåÆFailure | `Retry.can_transition_to(Failure) == true` |

### can_transition_to() ŌĆö Invalid Transitions

| ID | Test | Covers | Assertion |
|----|------|--------|-----------|
| T27 | `terminal_no_transitions` | terminal states cannot transition | Success, Failure, Revoked, Rejected `.can_transition_to(x) == false` for all x |
| T28 | `pending_invalid_transitions` | Pending rejects invalid targets | PendingŌåÆStarted, PendingŌåÆSuccess, PendingŌåÆFailure, PendingŌåÆRetry, PendingŌåÆRejected, PendingŌåÆOffloaded, PendingŌåÆPending all false |
| T29 | `received_invalid_transitions` | Received rejects invalid targets | ReceivedŌåÆSuccess, ReceivedŌåÆFailure, ReceivedŌåÆRetry, ReceivedŌåÆPending, ReceivedŌåÆOffloaded, ReceivedŌåÆReceived all false |
| T30 | `started_invalid_transitions` | Started rejects invalid targets | StartedŌåÆPending, StartedŌåÆReceived, StartedŌåÆRejected, StartedŌåÆStarted all false |
| T31 | `offloaded_invalid_transitions` | Offloaded rejects invalid targets | OffloadedŌåÆPending, OffloadedŌåÆReceived, OffloadedŌåÆStarted, OffloadedŌåÆRejected, OffloadedŌåÆOffloaded all false |
| T32 | `retry_invalid_transitions` | Retry rejects invalid targets | RetryŌåÆStarted, RetryŌåÆSuccess, RetryŌåÆRevoked, RetryŌåÆRejected, RetryŌåÆOffloaded, RetryŌåÆRetry all false |

### TaskResult Constructors

| ID | Test | Covers | Assertion |
|----|------|--------|-----------|
| T33 | `pending_result` | TaskResult::pending | state==Pending, result==None, error==None, retries==0, completed_at==None |
| T34 | `success_result` | TaskResult::success | state==Success, result==Some(val), error==None, completed_at==Some(_) |
| T35 | `failure_result` | TaskResult::failure | state==Failure, result==None, error==Some(msg), completed_at==Some(_) |
| T36 | `result_serde_round_trip` | Serialize/Deserialize TaskResult | serializeŌåÆdeserialize preserves all fields |

### Trait Bounds

| ID | Test | Covers | Assertion |
|----|------|--------|-----------|
| T37 | `task_state_is_copy_clone_eq` | Copy+Clone+Eq derives | `let a = TaskState::Pending; let b = a; assert_eq!(a, b);` |
| T38 | `task_state_debug` | Debug derive | `format!("{:?}", TaskState::Pending)` contains "Pending" |
| T39 | `task_result_is_clone` | Clone derive | `TaskResult::pending(id).clone()` works |
